# Potential Energy vs Temperature calibration data
# Extracted from final_multitemp experimental data with multi-replica ensemble averaging
# All energies are production averages (equilibration period removed)
# Units: Temperature in K, Energy in Hartree
# Source: examples/final_multitemp/potential_energy_components_vs_temperature.txt
#
# Columns:
#   temperature: Average simulated temperature (K)
#   total_potential_energy_hartree: Total potential energy (Hartree)  
#   harmonic_hartree: Harmonic bond energy (Hartree)
#   coulombic_hartree: Coulombic energy (Hartree)
#   lj_hartree: Lennard-Jones energy (Hartree)
